item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 1min Ulster head coach Richie Murphy makes just one change for Friday's United Rugby Champion
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 1min Ulster head coach Richie Murphy makes just one change for Friday's United Rugby Championship inter-provincial derby against Leinster in Belfast
#BBCRugby 1 35

item.title: UlsterGAA: The GAA reposteó Ulster GAA @UlsterGAA · 2h Tickets are now on sale online for next Saturday’s Ulster Senior Football C
item.description:
The GAA reposteó Ulster GAA @UlsterGAA · 2h Tickets are now on sale online for next Saturday’s Ulster Senior Football Championship Quarter Final at Brewster Park.
@FermanaghGAA v @Armagh_GAA
Saturday 25th April Throw-in: 5.30pm
Buy here
http:// ulster.gaa.ie/tickets
#Ulster2026 4 6 1 mil

item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 9min Northern Ireland will face two-time world champions France in a friendly in the lead-up
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 9min Northern Ireland will face two-time world champions France in a friendly in the lead-up to the latter's World Cup campaign
#BBCFootball 1 2 221
